cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this problem step by step. So, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16th birthday. We need to find the date one year ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so maybe I can check them after figuring it out. First, let me clarify the birth date. The last day of February is usually the 28th in non-leap years and the 29th in leap years. Since 2001 is not a leap year (because 2001 divided by 4 is 500.25, so not a whole number), the last day of February 2001 would be February 28, 2001. So Jane's birthday is 02/28/2001.
